key_accounting_policies.revenue_recognition: Franchise fees, property revenues, supply chain sales recognized per GAAP. Deferred franchise fee revenue and incentives amortized over contract term.
key_accounting_policies.depreciation: Property and equipment depreciated over useful lives. Accumulated depreciation $1,245M as of Dec 31, 2025.
key_accounting_policies.impairment: Annual goodwill test Oct 1. Carrols BK reporting unit fair value only ~7.0% above $1,000M carrying value. Firehouse >20% above.
key_accounting_policies.lease_accounting: ~4,700 restaurant properties leased/subleased to franchisees. Operating leases (straight-line), sales-type leases, direct financing leases. ROU assets and lease liabilities on balance sheet.
key_accounting_policies.income_taxes: Current/deferred by jurisdiction. GILTI as period cost. Rate reconciliation from Canada federal statutory rate.
key_accounting_policies.advertising_fund: Advertising commitments $195M mostly due within 12 months. Fund reimbursements for marketing support.
key_accounting_policies.derivatives: $5,700M cross-currency swaps hedging Canadian subsidiary net investment. Level 2 fair value.

related_party.timwen_partnership: 50% JV with Wendy's for Canadian combination restaurant real estate. Distributions $15M (2025). Rent expense $21M (2025).
